ai_summary: This document confirms Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Limited's compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MUFG Intime India Private Limited, certified that all securities received for dematerialisation were processed (accepted/rejected), listed on stock exchanges, and physical certificates were appropriately mutilated and cancelled within prescribed timelines. This indicates sound adherence to regulatory requirements regarding shareholder records, with no adverse material impacts or red flags identified.
